mapper.insert: INSERT INTO property_reviews (user_id, property_id, content, rating) VALUES (#{userId}, #{propertyId}, #{content}, #{rating})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS userName, r.property_id AS propertyId, r.content AS content, r.rating AS rating, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM property_reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.property_id = #{propertyId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM property_reviews WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
